description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-pagination: page navigation for content listings. Override pager.html.twig in Drupal. Supports page numbers, prev/next, and jump-to-page.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-pagination/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Page number buttons with ellipsis
- [ ] Previous/Next navigation
- [ ] First/Last page buttons (optional)
- [ ] Configurable sibling/boundary count
- [ ] CSS parts: nav, list, item, button, ellipsis
- [ ] Events: hx-page-change
- [ ] ARIA: nav with aria-label=Pagination
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** medium
title: Implement hx-pagination component
